metadata.title: Northeast Chevrolet Car Shows, Events & Sources (April 2026 - April 2027)

events.name: Spring Carlisle Collector Car Flea Market, Corral & Auction
events.description: One of the world's largest automotive flea markets. 8,100 vendor spaces with parts, accessories, collectibles, memorabilia, and classic cars for sale. Collector Car Auction runs April 23-24 at the Carlisle Expo Center.

events.name: Spring Classic at TOBAY Beach
events.description: Features classic and hot rod cars from the tri-state region at the beachside venue on Long Island.

events.name: Cruisin' Ocean City (36th Annual)
events.description: Nationally recognized event attracting 3,000+ customs, hot rods, street machines, and classics. Swap meet and vendors inside OC Convention Center. Boardwalk parades Thursday-Saturday mornings. All makes welcome, heavy Chevy presence.

events.name: Greenbrier Concours d'Elegance
events.description: Weekend of drives, receptions, car shows, seminars, and dinners culminating in Sunday Concours with ~100 top collector cars judged on the front lawn. 2026 featured class is Chrysler.

events.name: Flemington Cruise Night - Chevy/Camaro/Chevelle/Cadillac Feature
events.description: Free cruise night featuring Chevy, Camaro, Chevelle, and Cadillac in the feature lot. 5:00-8:00 PM. Hundreds of classic cars on the East Coast's premier Main Street cruise.

events.name: Bentley's Season Open Car Show
events.description: Season opening car show. Weekly Cruisin' Night Tuesday Car Shows follow from May 19 through September 22, 2026.

events.name: Bonny Eagle Car Show
events.description: Public gates open at 8am. All-makes car show at the school grounds.

events.name: Port 5 Naval Veterans Car Show
events.description: Car show presented by Port 5 Naval Veterans. 9:00 AM to 3:00 PM. All makes welcome.

events.name: Corvette Club of Western MA - 10th Annual All Corvette Show

location.venue: Chicopee Moose Family Center, 244 Fuller Road

events.description: All-Corvette show hosted by the Corvette Club of Western Massachusetts. 10:00 AM start.

events.name: Hemmings Cruise-In
events.description: Better Bennington Corp partners with Hemmings Motor News. Main Street transformed into car museum. All year/make/model welcome. Free entry, no pre-registration. Live music.

events.name: NHRA Potomac Nationals
events.description: Inaugural NHRA national event at Maryland International Raceway. 12,000-hp, 340-mph nitro machines. Chevrolet Camaro ZL1 is the official Chevy body in the 2026 NASCAR/NHRA season.

events.name: Vettes of Coastal Maine - Bar Harbor Tour
events.description: Multi-day Corvette touring event along the Maine coast to Bar Harbor.

events.name: Cruise Night on Main Street (28th Annual) - Middletown
events.description: 4:30-8:00 PM. Entry $10, spectators free. One of Connecticut's largest annual cruise nights.

events.name: NHRA New England Nationals (13th Annual)
events.description: NHRA Mission Foods Drag Racing Series national event. Top Fuel, Funny Car, Pro Stock racing.

events.name: Carlisle GM Nationals
events.description: 1,000+ GM vehicles on the National Parts Depot Showfield. Special 2026 features: 100 Years of Pontiac, C10 & Square Body Chevy display, 3rd-gen Camaro/Firebird showcase, Solid Lifter Showroom for high-performance GM muscle. Chevrolet, Buick, Cadillac, GMC, Oldsmobile, Pontiac all represented.

events.name: All Wheels Car Show
events.description: Two-day all-makes car show at the Delaware State Fairgrounds.

events.name: Old Timers' Day Classic Car Show & Family Festival (69th Annual)
events.description: 8:00 AM - 3:00 PM. Over 100 vehicles from 2006 and earlier. Family festival atmosphere.

events.name: Bay State Motor Festival
events.description: Major Massachusetts car show and motor festival. All makes welcome.

events.name: NVCC Chantilly Corvette Show
events.description: All-Corvette show hosted by Northern Virginia Corvette Club, sponsored by Pohanka Chevrolet. Benefits Western Fairfax Christian Ministries Food Pantry. Raffles, music, food, ice cream.

events.name: Camaro Nationals (27th Annual)
events.description: Indoor and outdoor event featuring 600+ judged and non-judged Camaros including restored, resto-mods, ProTouring, race cars and daily drivers. Produced by the American Camaro Association. 40-acre venue with 8 climate-controlled acres under roof. Space for 750+ F-Bodies, 100+ trailers, parts/swap vendors, food trucks.

events.name: Steel Town Corvette Club - 45th Annual All-Chevy Show
events.description: All-Chevrolet show with 32 award classes. Main fundraiser for Steel Town Corvette Club (est. 1972). Sponsored by Colussy Chevrolet for 40+ years. Registration forms available on website.

events.name: Vettes at the Beach (33rd Annual)
events.description: One of the largest single-day premier Corvette shows in the Northeast. 400+ participants, several thousand enthusiasts. 9 AM to 3 PM. Music, 50/50s, door prizes, dash plaques for first 150 pre-registrations. All net proceeds go to local charities.

events.name: Carlisle Truck Nationals
events.description: Three-day event dedicated to trucks, from vintage to contemporary. Classic Chevrolet C10s and modern trucks featured prominently.

events.name: State Fair of West Virginia Car Show
events.description: 11 AM - 4 PM during the 100th Annual State Fair. Open to 1969 or older custom hot rods, rat rods, classics, antiques, drag cars. Limited 1970-1985 hot rods and muscle cars accepted.

events.name: East Coast Chevy Show - Chevy vs. The World
events.type: drag racing / car show / swap meet
events.description: Drag racing, car show, and swap meet at Virginia Motorsports Park. 'Chevy vs. The World' format opens event to all makes for competition against Chevys.

events.name: MPACT Shakedown Motorsports Festival & Car Show
events.description: Timed Track X, Roll Racing, drifting, and curated car show at Pocono Raceway.

events.name: Corvettes at Carlisle
events.description: The largest all-Corvette show in the world. Nearly 3,000 Corvettes on the Fun Field representing all generations (C1 through C8). Autocross, exhaust contests, seminars, automotive flea market, all-Corvette car corral, Manufacturers Midway. Special 2026: 200+ red/white/blue Corvettes forming American flag on Fun Field (Fri 9AM-2PM), 50th Anniversary display of the 1976 Corvette. General admission $20, kids 12 & under free, parking $10.

events.name: Flemington Cruise Night - Corvette Feature
events.description: Free cruise night with Corvette feature lot. 5:00-8:00 PM. Free for spectators and car owners.

events.name: Olcott Beach Car Show
events.description: 8:00 AM - 4:30 PM. One of the largest outdoor car events in Western New York. Shaded park on the shores of Lake Ontario with vintage, muscle, and modern cars.

events.name: For Corvettes Only - 19th Annual Vettes at Ocean Beach Park
events.description: All-Corvette charity car show at Ocean Beach Park. 10:00 AM start.

events.name: PDRA Drag Racing - Virginia Motorsports Park
events.description: Professional Drag Racers Association national event. Many Chevy-powered entries.

events.name: The British Invasion XXXV
events.description: Largest all-British motorcar show in the US with 500+ British motorcars. Not Chevy-specific but a major Northeast car event.

events.name: Jets & Vettes Corvette Show

location.venue: New England Air Museum, 36 Perimeter Road

events.description: All-Corvette show at the New England Air Museum. 10:00 AM start. Unique pairing of Corvettes and historic aircraft.

events.name: The Boston Cup Classic Car Show
events.description: 8 AM to 2 PM. Premier classic car show featuring nostalgic models, muscle cars, supercars, and rare concours-winning machines on Boston Common.

events.name: Fall Carlisle Collector Car Flea Market, Corral & Auction
events.description: 8,100 vendor spaces with parts, accessories, cars, collectibles, memorabilia. Collector Car Auction runs October 1-2 at the Carlisle Expo Center.

events.name: Audrain's Newport Concours & Motor Week
events.description: Celebration of sportsmanship and motoring history in Newport. Expanded Veteran Car Tour weekend format for 2026.

events.name: AACA Eastern Fall Meet (Hershey)
events.type: swap meet / flea market / car show
events.description: 71st edition of one of the world's largest antique car shows & auto flea markets. Thousands of vendor spaces selling rare parts and memorabilia, huge car corral, prestigious judged show for restored vehicles. Free admission to flea market, car corral, and car show.

events.name: Endless Summer Cruisin' (29th Annual)
events.description: Major fall cruisin' event with classic cars, hot rods, and custom vehicles throughout Ocean City.

events.name: Hot Rods & Heroes Car Show
events.description: Gates open at 10 AM. Charity car show raising funds for Veterans Forward Maine.

events.name: Yesterday's Chevrolet Annual Fox Run Car Show
events.description: Hosted by Yesterday's Chevrolet car club. 10 AM - 2 PM. Trophies, music, food. $10 entry. All makes and models welcome but hosted by a Chevy club.

events.name: St. Albans FOP Car Show

location.venue: St. Albans Police Department HQ, 613 MacCorkle Ave

events.description: 9:00 AM - 3:00 PM. Car show hosted by the Fraternal Order of Police.

events.name: Del Rods Car Club Spring Kick-Off Show
events.description: 10 AM - 2 PM. Trophies, dash plaques, door prizes, music. All makes welcome.

events.name: Carroll County Car Fest
events.description: 150+ car show featuring classic, custom, and unique vehicles.

events.name: NH Muscle Cars Season Opener
events.description: All-vehicle car show with 35 trophies, fair food vendors, outdoor vendors, special exhibits, live music. Family-friendly and open to the public. 7th season at Deerfield.

events.name: NH Muscle Cars Summer Sizzler
events.description: All-vehicle show with 35 trophies, vendors, live music.

events.name: NH Muscle Cars Spooktacular Season Closer
events.description: Fall-themed car show with Trunk or Treat Halloween-decorated show cars, crafters, outdoor vendors, live music, indoor Trunk or Treat displays, Kids Kar Show and Parade, seasonal fair food.

events.name: New England Dragway Swap Meet Series
events.dates: April 30, May 28, June 25, July 30, Aug 27, Sep 24, Oct 29, 2026
events.description: Monthly swap meet/flea market with automotive parts, tools, and accessories. Vendor spaces $30. Buyer/spectator admission free.

events.name: South Jersey Region AACA 54th Annual Swap Meet & Car Corral
events.description: 8 AM - 4 PM. Over 350 vendors expected. Large annual automotive swap meet.

events.name: PDRA Drag Racing - Memorial Day Weekend
events.description: Professional Drag Racers Association national event. Memorial Day weekend.

events.name: Yesterday's Chevrolet Fox Run Cruise (Monthly)
events.description: Monthly cruise hosted by Yesterday's Chevrolet car club. 4-7 PM. All makes welcome.

events.name: Cars and Cannoli Cruise (Monthly)

location.venue: Buon Appetito Pizza, Sully Place Shopping Center

events.description: 9 AM - 1 PM. Monthly cruise-in open to all makes. Northern Virginia.

events.name: Cars & Coffee Vermont (Monthly)
events.description: Monthly Cars & Coffee meets at two Vermont locations. Also a special event at Vermont SportsCar on May 9.

events.name: Longley's Cruise Nights (Weekly)
events.description: 4-8 PM every Friday. Weekly recurring cruise night. All makes welcome.

events.name: Hlobik's Car Show at American Legion (Weekly)
events.description: 4-8 PM every Monday, rain or shine. Recurring weekly car show.

events.name: Bentley's Cruisin' Night Tuesday Car Shows (Weekly)
events.description: Weekly Tuesday evening cruise nights throughout the summer season.

events.name: Fredericksburg Cruise at Gourmeltz (Weekly)
events.description: 5-9 PM. Trophies, charity donations each month. Oldies music and DJ. Lots of parking.

events.name: Fredericksburg Harrison Crossing Cruise (Weekly)
events.description: Weekly Sunday cruise, open to all years/makes/models. Family-oriented. Weather permitting.

sources.name: NortheastWheelsEvents.com
sources.description: Comprehensive regional car show calendar covering the entire Northeast. Filterable by event type (car show, swap meet, cruise, drag racing) and location. One of the best single sources for the region.

sources.name: CarCruiseFinder.com
sources.description: Updated daily with car shows and cruise-ins. State-specific pages with flyers, event times, and locations. Covers every target state.

sources.name: CarShowNationals.com
sources.description: State-by-state car show listings. Good for finding events in smaller states.

sources.name: Carlisle Events
sources.description: Official site for all Carlisle Fairgrounds events including GM Nationals, Corvettes at Carlisle, Truck Nationals, Spring/Fall flea markets. The biggest car show venue in the Northeast.

sources.name: RIDE-CT (Classic Cars)
sources.description: Comprehensive 2026 Connecticut car show calendar and cruise night listings. Updated regularly. Email submissions accepted.

sources.name: NewJerseyCarShows.com
sources.description: Free listings for NJ car shows, cruise nights, and swap meets. Monthly calendars.

sources.name: NJCruiseNews.com
sources.description: NJ cruise night and car show listings organized by county.

sources.name: Capital Cruisin'
sources.description: Virginia car show and cruise-in listings. Good for Northern Virginia and Fredericksburg events.

sources.name: Car Club Council of Hampton Roads
sources.description: Events calendar for the Hampton Roads car club council covering southeastern Virginia.

sources.name: Y2Camaro.com - New England Car Show Schedule
sources.coverage: New England (CT, MA, ME, NH, RI, VT)
sources.description: 2026 New England car show schedule with events continuously being added.

sources.name: NewEnglandAutoShows.com
sources.description: Calendar of car shows across New England with detailed listings.

sources.name: CruisinBruce.com
sources.description: General car show and cruise event calendar for the New England area.

sources.name: Massachusetts Association of Auto Clubs
sources.description: Event listings from the Massachusetts Association of Auto Clubs.

sources.name: Vette-Vues.com Corvette Calendar
sources.description: Extensive Corvette event calendar nationwide. Great for finding Corvette-specific shows in any state.

sources.name: CorvetteForum.com - Northeast Section
sources.description: Active forum with annual consolidated Corvette show lists for New England and Northeast states. Community-maintained and updated.

sources.name: CarsAndCoffeeEvents.com
sources.description: State-by-state car show, bike show, and truck show listings. Includes Cars & Coffee events.

sources.name: Flemington Car Shows
sources.description: Schedule for Flemington cruise nights, which feature different marques each month including Chevy/Camaro/Chevelle and Corvette nights.

sources.name: Car Show & Cruise Guide (CarCruiseGuide.com)
sources.description: Car show and cruise night listings for the mid-Atlantic region.

sources.name: OldRide.com Events
sources.description: Classic car & truck shows, auctions, swap meets, motorcycle show listings by state.

sources.name: Cruising Magazine Events Calendar
sources.description: Auto & motorcycle event information and event calendar.

sources.name: CarShowz.com - Virginia
sources.description: Virginia car show listings with photos from events.

sources.name: Facebook: NEW JERSEY CAR SHOWS AND CRUISE NIGHT FLYERS
sources.description: Active Facebook group where NJ car show flyers are posted. Good for last-minute and smaller events.

sources.name: Facebook: Central New York Car Show & Cruise-In Scene
sources.description: Central NY car show and cruise-in listings and community.

sources.name: Vintage Chevrolet Club of America (VCCA)
sources.description: Nonprofit dedicated to preservation and restoration of all Chevrolets and GMCs. Regional chapters host shows throughout the Northeast.

sources.name: American Camaro Association / Camaro Nationals
sources.description: Not-for-profit club producing the annual Camaro Nationals in Morgantown, PA. Good resource for Camaro-specific events.

sources.name: Special Event Productions (Cruisin' Ocean City)
sources.description: Organizer of Cruisin' Ocean City and Endless Summer Cruisin' events. Two of the largest car cruise events in the mid-Atlantic.

sources.name: Car Club Council of Central Virginia
sources.description: Calendar of car club events in the central Virginia region.

sources.name: GetOutGarage.com
sources.description: Car show and cruise night discovery platform filterable by state.

sources.name: Vermont Auto Enthusiasts (VTAuto.org)
sources.description: Vermont car show listings from the Vermont Auto Enthusiasts organization.

sources.name: Rhode Island Street Rodding Association
sources.description: RI car show, swap meet, and cruise listings.
